title: Fractional CMO — Delivery model
description: Senior growth leadership that runs Research, Acquisition, and Operating Cadence as an integrated system. A VP-level operator in the room without the full-time hire.
audience: Best for Seed to Series B B2B SaaS and AI teams that need strategic leadership before a full-time CMO. Retainer £10k–£15k / month, 3-month minimum.
promise: A calm senior operator accountable for growth decisions, sequencing, vendor and team direction, and execution quality — until you're ready for a full-time hire.
outcomes: Quarterly growth priorities and decision rules
Hiring, vendor, and channel sequencing decisions
Founder messaging and investor narrative support
A marketing function that keeps getting stronger, not more chaotic
process: Diagnose current constraints, team capacity, and funding runway
Set quarterly priorities and install the Phase 1–3 system
Lead execution across research, campaigns, and conversion
Document and hand off the operating system to the next hire
